title: sha2 dep: add sha2=0.10 to workspace
description:
Why: SHA-256 computation required for blob upload verification and download integrity checking. No sha2 dep exists in workspace.

What: Add sha2='0.10' to workspace Cargo.toml, add sha2.workspace=true to jmap-chat Cargo.toml.

Algorithm:
1. Add sha2='0.10' to [workspace.dependencies] in root Cargo.toml
2. Add sha2.workspace=true to crates/jmap-chat/Cargo.toml [dependencies]
3. Run cargo check to confirm
acceptance_criteria: cargo check passes; sha2 in Cargo.lock
